overview: GUCCORA is a premium product-based MLM e-commerce platform. Users register with mobile+password, browse and buy real products (₹599–₹2999), upload UTR payment screenshots for admin approval, and earn fixed commissions from product referrals across 10 levels. The admin has a separate secure login to manage products, users, orders, withdrawals, and send notifications.
features: Mobile number + password login with persistent session
Product management: admin adds/edits/deletes products with images
User control: admin can activate, deactivate, or put users on hold
UPI payment flow with UTR screenshot upload and admin order approval
Mandatory delivery address capture at checkout
Commission payouts: ₹40 direct, ₹5×10 levels, ₹3 pair (₹93 cap per order)
Admin notification system to all or individual users
Withdrawal system with bank/UPI details requirement and admin approval
Premium black and gold UI, fully mobile responsive
